actions.text: Move high-value liquor from the bottom shelves of the wall display (a9) and cabinet (a4) to the highest available shelves or upper storage area.
Relocate the glass display showcase (a6) to the highest point in the shop or onto a secure elevated platform.
Move the Coca-Cola rack (a1) and bottled water (a5) to the highest available shelving or top of the service counter.
Unplug all chest freezers (a7, a8) and the service counter equipment, then switch off the main power supply at the distribution board.
